title: unona glaucocarpa
intro: Unona glaucocarpa, also known as the African blue basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Unona glaucocarpa include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Unona glaucocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
